The '''Sljees''' were [[Humanoid/Legends|nonhumanoid]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sljee/Legends|Sljee]]. 

==Biology and appearance==
They had low, slab-shaped bodies, with multiple legs, tentacles, and six jointed antennae with bulbs on the end. These antennae, called olfactory stalks, were their primary sense organs. Their unusual appearance led some non-Sjlee to mistake them for exotic animals, or even some sort of motile plants.<ref name="Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook" />

[[File:Sljee.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A Sljee.]]

Sljees were [[olfax]]es, beings who sensed their surroundings and communicated primarily through scent. The Sljees even developed technological devices for scent-based communication. Though their senses of touch and hearing were comparable to [[Human/Legends|Humans]], they were completely blind.<ref name="Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook" />

When they left their homeworld, they had difficulty integrating with [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] society. In addition to the problems posed by their nonhumanoid shape and their blindness, they were often overwhelmed with the unfamiliar scents of alien worlds. Until they familiarized themselves with these new scents, they often had difficulty recognizing other beings, or even telling different species apart.<ref name="Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook" /> One unfortunate Sljee who worked as a waiter on [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] mistook [[Odumin|Spray]], a [[Tynnan/Legends|Tynnan]], for the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca's]] "hatchling".<ref name="Han Solo's Revenge">''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]''</ref> With practice, however, Sljees could learn to distinguish species and individuals, and identify them by smell from one hundred meters away.<ref name="Jeseej and the Sljee" />

==Sljee in the galaxy==
[[Jeseej]], a restaurateur, forger, and fortune-teller on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], was one Sljee who managed to find a comfortable niche among non-Sljee.<ref name="Jeseej and the Sljee" /> Most other Sljees found off their homeworld lived in groups, either because of difficulty integrating with other species or because of their naturally communal culture.<ref name="Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook" />

[[Gorm (cyborg)|Gorm the Dissolver]], a patchwork cyborg/organic bounty hunter, had Sljee leg components.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
